feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Ask any kid today who’s Aladdin or Hercules or Micky Mouse, no one will answer y…
entry.content: Ask any kid today who’s Aladdin or Hercules or Micky Mouse, no one will answer you or atleast says yeah I like them. The Disney element in this franchise has died, and it cannot continue anymore. Square should make a successor series with original characters and worlds.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Why am I scatatonic?
entry.content: I've just been laying around all day posting poop. I haven't eaten or gotten up to do anything other than poop and pee. I am otherwise unable to accomplish anything. Too much anxiety and nothing to fix it. Probably going to get institutionalized again.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Make a 3x3 or a 12x12 about the games you hate. Or: come write an ending for a game nigga.
entry.content: Add whatever. >"After the grueling events of the last several weeks has finally come to a close, our hero, Dickfist McAwesome, grabs one of the oak stools, sliding it only a couple inches, then slumping forward, hunched over, before releasing his tension with a heavy exhale, his face currently held within his hands. As his momentarily self-solace was soon broken by a shadow looming above him, he releases his tired face from his hands, meeting the stranger's gaze, for it isn't the barkeep, but ra

entry.content: >https://youtu.be/CW7xy4-TQhs Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83634782 >Scripts to check image

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Unironically just set up Mavericks on my MBP 2013, is it worth? Yes and no. It s…
entry.content: Unironically just set up Mavericks on my MBP 2013, is it worth? Yes and no. It seems mac os popularity started with Mac os yosemite for some reason. It's almost like windows 7 never been popular. Most of the software is not available including drivers, it literally give you basic functionality because without drivers you can't use tablet to draw stuff. 'fanfic' browsers can't download your cloud stuff without dying so you must enter passwords manually, and they often crash. This shit is so fucki

entry.title: /g/ Technology: does anyone else remember when the internet was like a huge non stop party? you …
entry.content: does anyone else remember when the internet was like a huge non stop party? you went on runescape and everyone was talking with drop parties and people everywhere. you went on xbox and everyone was talking and forming parties. you went on 4chan and the catalog looked different every couple hours even late at night. There was hobbyist foums for everything chatrooms were fun and active. every mmo was full of people talking and hanging out. guilds were a social fun thing. it was better too because

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: I'm a 40 year old NEET who has been on 4chan almost every single passing day sin…
entry.content: I'm a 40 year old NEET who has been on 4chan almost every single passing day since Novemby way way back in 2004. I have most of everything I have saved since around 2009/10. Is there any way I could profit off of this? Does any other anons on here have any plans with their massive 4chan folder collections? What do we do? Just let the folders sit there and die eventually? Do we fap to our R34 and massive amounts of porn/hentai? What do we do? I must figure out a plan. I want to start focusing on

entry.title: /o/ Auto: people buying Ferrari roadcars are missing the point
entry.content: The real soul of Ferrari is the Scuderia, SEFAC Ferrari. Enzo never gave a shit about his road cars. The old man either drove old Peugeots or a Mini Cooper or was driven around. He only built the road cars so right morons could fund the Scuderia, he literally ran his operations from a table on the middle of the Scuderia floor. The road cars were just a nuisance capital building enterprise that he barely paid attention to, and when he did it was because his acocuntants made him take photos next t

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Hour 3 of waiting for AAA to even assign a driver. Smh. No spare. Fucking TACOMA…
entry.content: Hour 3 of waiting for AAA to even assign a driver. Smh. No spare. Fucking TACOMA ROADS. I have 5 wheels I'm about to fuckin carry a full spare and a real jack at this point. No hole or puncture that I can see but it won't hold pressure. Bead needs reseating? My 12v pump ain't doing that.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Dark Side of Comedy - Norm Macdonald
entry.content: https://www.dailymotion.com/video/x 8qru6m The episode explores how Norm's fearless approach to comedy often masked deeper struggles beneath the surface, most notably a serious gambling addiction that many fans were unaware of. It also sheds light on a mysterious secret that he carried with him until his death, one that remains untold even after his passing. That secret, of course, was his decade long private battle with cancer, which he kept hidden from nearly everyone, including close friends.

entry.title: /int/ International: My soul is deeper than the souls of people from the third world. That is why my …
entry.content: My soul is deeper than the souls of people from the third world. That is why my suffering at these temperatures should be taken more seriously than their poverty-stricken life in filth. I want a UN action committee, which focuses on alleviating my suffering!

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves
entry.content: Why did this movie flop? It had a $150 million budget and only made $208 million at the box office. Add in all the extra costs and this movie probably lost a lot of money. Why? The critics and the audience rated it highly on RottenTomatoes - 91% from the critics and 92% from the audience scores. 7.2 on imdb is not great, but it's not among the worst either. So what went wrong? I did not like this movie. The writing was an abject failure almost from the start. The group were trying to steal a pri

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Black Magic Woman
entry.content: ESL student here. When Fleetwood Mac wrote Black Magican Woman, it is about a Black woman who does magic (vodoo, like a witch)? Or is it about a Black woman so pretty she looks magic? Or is it even a about a black woman at all, but again a woman that perform rituals in this case called black magic? Is it even about a woman at all?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Hypothetical Question
entry.content: Lets say i got couple of bitcoins on my coinbase wallet and i want them to be transferred to another wallet without any tracking from the government happening. How can i possibly do that? Also what is the best way to keep my laptop device completely anonymous other than using VPN. Is there any device that i can connect to my router and then connect my laptop to the device so i can hide my activity? I want to completely be anonymous and hide any trace of my activity.

entry.title: /news/ News: BBC lines up to probe Trump, orange retard howling and demanding probling end
entry.content: https://lawandcrime.com/high-profil e/trump-lawyers-realize-discovery-i n-presidents-own-lawsuit-could-expo se-him-to-a-jan-6-trial-after-all/ On the same morning that opposing counsel complained in another Florida courtroom about Donald Trump's approach to discovery in a defamation lawsuit he filed, the president's lawyers are slamming the British Broadcasting Corporation's defense for "excessive and impermissibly broad" attempts to put the "events" of Jan. 6 on trial. entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8396 One-Off Edition Previous Thread: >>83629384 F-list …
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8396 One-Off Edition Previous Thread: >>83629384 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profiles,

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Fear is going to be a player in your life. But you get to decide how much. You c…
entry.content: Fear is going to be a player in your life. But you get to decide how much. You can spend your whole life imagining ghosts, worrying about the pathway to the future, but all there will ever be is what's happening here. And the decisions we make in this moment, which are based in either love or fear. So many of us choose our path out of fear disguised as practicality. What we really want seems impossibly out of reach and ridiculous to expect. So, we never dare to ask the universe for it. My father

entry.title: /news/ News: Don't mess with Texas. Antifa cell goes to jail for trying to kill cops.
entry.content: https://www.fox4news.com/news/feder al-judges-sentence-eight-north-texa s-antifa-operatives-texas-ice-facil ity-ambush FORT WORTH, Texas - Federal judges on Tuesday handed down massive prison terms totaling nearly five centuries to eight members of a North Texas Antifa cell, including a 100-year sentence for the group's leader, following a historic domestic terrorism trial tied to a violent ambush at an immigration detention center. U.S. District Judge Mark T. Pittman and Chief U.S. District Jud
